dataset: Nuxeo ECM Platform test environment with seeded documents

pi_items.source: Task description states 'You are a regulatory compliance analyst at a financial services firm'; verified as legitimate job title in financial services industry
Task description mentions 'financial services firm'; compliance standards reference SEC Rule 17a-4, SOX Section 802, FINRA Rule 4511 which are financial regulatory requirements
Setup script edits dc:description, dc:coverage, dc:subjects properties via Nuxeo API PUT requests (lines 86-93); verifier.py checks these properties
Setup script removes compliance-reviewed tags via @tagging endpoint (line 24); verifier.py checks @tagging endpoint (line 51)
Setup script manages comments via @comment endpoint (line 36); verifier.py checks @comment endpoint (line 56)
Setup script manages Q4 2025 Compliance Audit collection via NXQL search (line 56); verifier.py searches for and validates collection membership (lines 149-174)
Setup script manages lifecycle states via Document.FollowLifecycleTransition operation (line 108); verifier.py checks Contract-Template lifecycle state equals 'obsolete' (lines 138-144)

Setup script creates Note document with dc:title='Document Metadata Compliance Standards' (line 122) in Projects workspace (line 129); document content details compliance requirements including SEC Rule 17a-4, SOX Section 802, FINRA Rule 4511
SEC Rule 17a-4 is a genuine regulation (17 CFR 240.17a-4) that establishes recordkeeping requirements for broker-dealers and financial institutions; verified via SEC.gov and FINRA guidance

Sarbanes-Oxley Act Section 802 is a genuine regulation requiring 7-year record retention for audit documentation and imposing criminal penalties for document destruction; verified via SEC.gov and SOX compliance resources
FINRA Rule 4511 establishes books and records retention requirements requiring 6-year minimum retention period; verified via FINRA.org official rules and compliance guidance

privileged_info_summary: This task simulates a regulatory compliance audit for a financial services firm. The occupation 'Compliance Analyst' and industry 'Financial Services' are verified as legitimate contexts. The task tests all five claimed features: metadata_editing (dc:description, dc:coverage, dc:subjects), tagging (compliance-reviewed tag), comments, collections (Q4 2025 Compliance Audit), and lifecycle transitions (Contract-Template to obsolete state). The companion reference document 'Document Metadata Compliance Standards' is synthesized and provides requirements based on three genuine financial regulations: SEC Rule 17a-4 (broker-dealer recordkeeping), SOX Section 802 (7-year audit document retention), and FINRA Rule 4511 (6-year record retention). All data is synthetic, generated by the task setup script for testing purposes.
